title: JWT Decoder
description: Decode and inspect JWT tokens instantly without sending them to a server
viralHook: Decode JWTs right in your browser -- no data leaves your machine

props.title: JWT Token Decoder
props.description: Paste a JWT token to instantly decode its header, payload, and metadata. Everything runs client-side -- your token never leaves your browser.

fields.label: JWT Token
fields.helperText: Paste the full JWT token (three base64url segments separated by dots)

fields.label: Header
fields.helperText: Decoded JOSE header (algorithm, token type, key ID)

fields.label: Payload
fields.helperText: Decoded claims payload (subject, issuer, custom claims)

fields.label: Issued At (iat)
fields.helperText: When the token was issued (converted from Unix timestamp)

fields.label: Expires At (exp)
fields.helperText: When the token expires (converted from Unix timestamp)

fields.label: Token Status
fields.helperText: Whether the token is currently valid, expired, or not yet valid

fields.label: Time Remaining
fields.helperText: Time until expiration or time since expiration
